signals.title: China delivers a one-two punch to America’s AI dominance
signals.desc: China's leading AI companies are ramping up the pressure on Silicon Valley, as Moonshot and Alibaba unveiled models they claim can go toe-to-toe with the best from OpenAI and Anthropic at a fraction of the cost. The rapid-fire releases suggest America's lead at the AI frontier is increasingly tight, just as the technology is becoming […]

signals.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
signals.desc: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

signals.title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
signals.desc: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents” are still chatbot wrappers, the control plane enterprises expect is deliberately hybrid to avoid lo

signals.title: Apple’s lawsuit couldn’t come at a worse time for OpenAI
signals.desc: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […

signals.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
signals.desc: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

signals.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
signals.desc: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

signals.title: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
signals.desc: Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn. After Project Indigo was launched last year to provide a "more natural (SLR-like) look" for iPhone photography, the Indigo camera app is now being updated with a suite of generative AI tools. And the change doesn't rely upon Adobe's own Firefly AI models. Adobe describes the […]

signals.title: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
signals.desc: The next time you apply for a job, AI may screen your résumé before any human sees it. But there’s good reason to question whether AI will judge you fairly. Researchers already know that LLMs pick up human biases from their training data. New research suggests that LLMs can also develop their own biases from…

signals.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
signals.desc: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.

signals.title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
signals.desc: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.

signals.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
signals.desc: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

signals.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
signals.desc: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

signals.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
signals.desc: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

signals.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
signals.desc: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

signals.title: Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
signals.desc: Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open source model, was trained to understand video and audio. It could help Thinking Machines establish itself among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI.

signals.title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
signals.desc: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Anthropic—currently the world’s most valuable AI company, with a nearly $1 trillion valuation—has a reputation for publishing strange and heady research. It’s looking into whether AI models can feel pain, for example,…

signals.title: Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts
signals.desc: The AI firm Anthropic has developed a technique that has given it the clearest glimpse yet at what’s really going on inside large language models as they answer questions or carry out tasks. What they found ranges from the mundane to the unnerving. Researchers at the company built a tool called the Jacobian lens (or…

signals.title: Introducing GPT-Live
signals.desc: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

signals.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
signals.desc: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

signals.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
signals.desc: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

signals.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
signals.desc: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.

signals.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
signals.desc: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.

signals.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
signals.desc: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.

signals.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
signals.desc: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers. The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McSweeney's, and founded multiple schools and nonprofits that support writers and the arts more broadly. So one might expect he'd roll into the company's offices and offer […]

signals.title: Google-backed satellites for wildfire detection launch as smoke chokes US, Canada
signals.desc: The FireSat program can spot wildfires that other satellites miss.

signals.title: A scorecard for the AI age
signals.desc: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

signals.title: Introducing the Codex Micro
signals.desc: See how the Codex Micro, a customizable keyboard built with Work Louder for Codex, helps you move through a build without leaving your flow. In this demo, GPT-5.6 Sol creates a word game while the Micro handles voice dictation, task switching, reasoning controls, permission requests, and follow-up prompts. Get yours: https://openai.com/supply/ Chapters: 00:00 Introducing the Codex Micro 00:24 Voic

signals.title: OpenAI wants its new tool to do your work for you and with you
signals.desc: Rebranded Codex promises independent workflows that can run "for hours if needed."

signals.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
signals.desc: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.

signals.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
signals.desc: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

signals.title: Your family’s $300 stake in OpenAI
signals.desc: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s oft-discussed promise that Americans will share in the wealth AI creates was in the news again last week. On Thursday, the Financial Times reported that Altman is in…

signals.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
signals.desc: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

signals.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
signals.desc: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

signals.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
signals.desc: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

signals.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
signals.desc: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

signals.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
signals.desc: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

signals.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
signals.desc: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

signals.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
signals.desc: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

signals.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
signals.desc: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.

signals.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
signals.desc: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
